<!-- Chart CH-TIM-13 STEP rendered in language DL-02 KATA -->

## STEP chart, KATA style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-13",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "change-over-time",
    "trend"
  ],
  "form": "step line (values hold between changes)",
  "data_required": "ordered periods + series whose value HOLDS until it changes (rates, stock, policy)",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-01 (continuous change)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "values change continuously",
      "use": "CH-TIM-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- levels that hold between discrete changes: stock, rates, headcount, policies
- the timing of the change is the message

Do NOT use when:
- continuously varying measures (use CH-TIM-01)
- cumulative progress (CH-TIM-02)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "eyebrow": "caps, DL chrome only",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on top tick",
  "x": "ordered periods",
  "series": "one key + optional context, values hold between points",
  "annotation": "optional, anchored at a data point"
}
```

```json
  "scale": {
    "step": true,

    "nice_steps": [
      1,
      2,
      5,
      10
    ]
  }
}
```

### Rules
- horizontal-then-vertical interpolation; the renderer draws the hold explicitly
- y starts at zero
- series labeled at line ends, never a legend
- annotation marks the change that matters

### Never do this
- smooth or diagonal interpolation of held values (invents data)
- markers on every step
- legends

### QA before delivering
- [ ] step interpolation verified
- [ ] y at zero
- [ ] no legend
- [ ] title states the level change with a number
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| key | `#008080` |
| context | `#AAAAAA` |
| gridline | `#EAEAEA` |
| zero_line | `#E2E8E8` |
| tick_label | `#555555` |
| x_label | `#555555` |
| key_label | `#008080` |
| context_label | `#555555` |
| title | `#222222` |
| source | `#555555` |
| annotation | `#555555` |

### Fonts

- Title font: 'Rethink Sans','Segoe UI',sans-serif, weight 600
- All other text: 'Poppins','Segoe UI',sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
